title: oberonia heliophila
intro: Oberonia heliophila, also known as the terrestrial orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Oberonia heliophila include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and reduce oxidative stress. Oberonia heliophila can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
